a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Share of deforestation that is driven by domestic consumption, 2013
The share of national deforestation that is driven by the production of goods that are consumed within domestic
markets i.e. not exported to other countries.
Data source: Pendrill, F., Persson, U. M., Godar, J., & Kastner, T. (2019). Deforestation displaced: trade in forest-risk commodities and the
prospects for a global forest transition.
